description: Your organization is preparing for a SOC 2 compliance audit. The auditor requires proof that the SOC team actively monitors SIEM usage to detect insider threats or compromised accounts exfiltrating data. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), use the internal `_audit` index to build two compliance artifacts. Create a dashboard named `Splunk_Usage_Audit` with at least three panels visualizing user search activity, ensuring the internal system user (`splunk-system-user`) is filtered out. Create a scheduled alert named `Data_Exfiltration_Via_Search` that monitors the `_audit` index for searches containing data export commands (`outputcsv`, `outputlookup`, or `export`) and configure it to run on an hourly schedule.
